original: First two hours, now three hours — this is how far in advance authorities are recommending people show up to catch a domestic flight, at least at some major U.S. airports with increasingly massive security lines.
translation_literal: 先是提前两小时，现在是提前三小时——这就是当局正在建议人们为赶上国内航班而提前到达的时间长度，至少在一些安检队伍越来越庞大的美国主要机场是这样。

chunks.english: First two hours, now three hours
chunks.chinese: 先是两小时，现在是三小时

chunks.english: how far in advance authorities are recommending people show up to catch a domestic flight
chunks.chinese: 当局正在建议人们为赶上国内航班提前多久到达

chunks.english: people show up to catch a domestic flight
chunks.chinese: 人们到场以赶上国内航班
chunks.relation: 作 recommending 的宾语内容
省略 that 的宾语内容内部主语
省略 that 的宾语内容内部谓语
说明 show up 的目的

chunks.english: at least at some major U.S. airports with increasingly massive security lines
chunks.chinese: 至少在一些安检队伍越来越庞大的美国主要机场

sentence_patterns.explanation: 破折号前的 First two hours, now three hours 是话题引入，主干是 this is how far...。

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: this is how... + 地点状语
sentence_patterns.explanation: 表语从句很长，需要先抓住 authorities are recommending people show up。

original: Americans are willing to tolerate time-consuming security procedures in return for increased safety.
translation_literal: 美国人愿意容忍耗时的安检程序，以换取更高的安全。

original: The crash of EgyptAir Flight 804, which terrorists may have downed over the Mediterranean Sea, provides another tragic reminder of why.
translation_literal: 埃及航空 804 航班的坠毁，恐怖分子可能已经在地中海上空将其击落，又提供了一个悲剧性的提醒，说明为什么会这样。

chunks.chinese: 埃及航空 804 航班的坠毁

chunks.english: which terrorists may have downed over the Mediterranean Sea
chunks.chinese: 恐怖分子可能已经在地中海上空将其击落
chunks.relation: 修饰 The crash of EgyptAir Flight 804
which 定语从句内部主语
which 定语从句内部谓语
作 downed 的宾语，指 Flight 804

chunks.chinese: 另一个关于原因的悲剧性提醒

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语 + 非限制性定语从句 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: which 从句插在主语和谓语之间，主干是 The crash provides another reminder。

original: But demanding too much of air travelers or providing too little security in return undermines public support for the process.
translation_literal: 但是，向航空旅客要求太多，或者作为回报提供太少的安全保障，会削弱公众对这一过程的支持。

chunks.english: demanding too much of air travelers or providing too little security in return
chunks.chinese: 向航空旅客要求太多，或者作为回报提供太少安全保障

chunks.english: demanding too much of air travelers
providing too little security in return
chunks.chinese: 作为回报提供太少安全保障
公众对这一过程的支持

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: doing A or doing B 作主语
sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个动名词短语并列作整体主语，谓语是 undermines。

original: And it should: Wasted time is a drag on Americans’ economic and private lives, not to mention infuriating.
translation_literal: 而且它确实应该如此：被浪费的时间是美国人经济生活和私人生活的拖累，更不用说还令人恼火。

chunks.english: Wasted time is a drag on Americans’ economic and private lives, not to mention infuriating
chunks.chinese: 被浪费的时间是美国人经济生活和私人生活的拖累，更不用说令人恼火
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释为什么 public support 应被削弱

chunks.english: a drag on Americans’ economic and private lives
chunks.chinese: 美国人经济生活和私人生活的拖累

chunks.relation: 补充说明 wasted time 的负面影响

sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后整句解释 why it should undermine public support。

original: Last year, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) found in a secret check that undercover investigators were able to sneak weapons — both fake and real — past airport security nearly every time they tried.
translation_literal: 去年，美国运输安全管理局在一次秘密检查中发现，卧底调查人员几乎每次尝试时都能够把武器——假的和真的都有——偷偷带过机场安检。

chunks.english: that undercover investigators were able to sneak weapons — both fake and real — past airport security nearly every time they tried
chunks.chinese: 卧底调查人员几乎每次尝试时都能够把武器偷偷带过机场安检

chunks.relation: every time 从句内部主语
every time 从句内部谓语

sentence_patterns.explanation: both fake and real 插入解释 weapons，主干是 investigators were able to sneak weapons。

original: Enhanced security measures since then, combined with a rise in airline travel due to the improving economy and low oil prices, have resulted in long waits at major airports such as Chicago’s O’Hare International.
translation_literal: 自那以后加强的安全措施，加上由于经济改善和低油价而带来的航空旅行增长，已经导致芝加哥奥黑尔国际机场等主要机场出现长时间等待。

chunks.chinese: 自那以后加强的安全措施

chunks.english: combined with a rise in airline travel due to the improving economy and low oil prices
chunks.chinese: 加上由于经济改善和低油价而带来的航空旅行增长
chunks.relation: 补充说明导致长时间等待的共同因素

chunks.english: due to the improving economy and low oil prices
chunks.chinese: 由于经济改善和低油价的
chunks.relation: 修饰 a rise in airline travel

chunks.english: long waits at major airports such as Chicago’s O’Hare International
chunks.chinese: 芝加哥奥黑尔国际机场等主要机场的长时间等待
chunks.relation: 作 resulted in 的宾语

chunks.chinese: 例如芝加哥奥黑尔国际机场

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语 + combined with 插入 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: combined with... 插在主语和谓语之间，主干是 measures have resulted in waits。

original: It is not yet clear how much more effective airline security has become — but the lines are obvious.
translation_literal: 航空安全已经变得有效多少尚不清楚——但是队伍很明显。

chunks.english: how much more effective airline security has become
chunks.chinese: 航空安全已经变得有效多少
chunks.relation: 真正主语，对应形式主语 It
作 has become 的表语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is + adj. + how 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 how much... 从句。

original: Part of the issue is that the government did not anticipate the steep increase in airline travel, so the TSA is now rushing to get new screeners on the line.
translation_literal: 问题的一部分在于，政府没有预料到航空旅行的急剧增加，所以运输安全管理局现在正急忙让新的安检员上岗。

chunks.english: that the government did not anticipate the steep increase in airline travel
chunks.chinese: 政府没有预料到航空旅行的急剧增加

chunks.english: the steep increase in airline travel
so the TSA is now rushing to get new screeners on the line
chunks.chinese: 所以运输安全管理局现在正急忙让新的安检员上岗
chunks.relation: 说明前一问题导致的结果

chunks.english: to get new screeners on the line
chunks.relation: 作 rushing 的目的/内容

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 表语从句 + so 结果分句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 前半说明问题原因，so 后说明 TSA 的应对。

original: Part of the issue is that airports have only so much room for screening lanes.
translation_literal: 问题的一部分在于，机场只有这么多用于安检通道的空间。

chunks.english: that airports have only so much room for screening lanes
chunks.chinese: 机场只有这么多用于安检通道的空间

chunks.english: only so much room for screening lanes
chunks.chinese: 只有这么多用于安检通道的空间

original: Another factor may be that more people are trying to overpack their carry-on bags to avoid checked-baggage fees, though the airlines strongly dispute this.
translation_literal: 另一个因素可能是，更多人正试图把随身行李装得过满，以避免托运行李费，尽管航空公司强烈否认这一点。

chunks.english: that more people are trying to overpack their carry-on bags to avoid checked-baggage fees
chunks.chinese: 更多人正试图把随身行李装得过满，以避免托运行李费
chunks.relation: 作 may be 的表语

chunks.english: though the airlines strongly dispute this
chunks.chinese: 尽管航空公司强烈否认这一点
chunks.relation: 对前面推测作让步说明

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 表语从句 + though 让步从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句解释 factor，though 从句说明航空公司并不承认这一因素。

original: There is one step the TSA could take that would not require remodeling airports or rushing to hire: Enroll more people in the PreCheck program.
translation_literal: 运输安全管理局可以采取一个不需要改造机场或急忙招聘的步骤：让更多人加入 PreCheck 项目。

chunks.chinese: 运输安全管理局可以采取的
chunks.relation: 省略 that 的定语从句，修饰 one step

chunks.english: that would not require remodeling airports or rushing to hire
chunks.chinese: 不需要改造机场或急忙招聘的

chunks.relation: that 定语从句内部主语
that 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: remodeling airports or rushing to hire
Enroll more people in the PreCheck program
chunks.chinese: 让更多人加入 PreCheck 项目
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释 one step 的具体内容

sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后的祈使句解释 one step 的具体做法。

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: one step + 两个定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: one step 后连续接两个定语从句，一个说明 TSA 能采取，一个说明不需要什么。

original: PreCheck is supposed to be a win-win for travelers and the TSA.
translation_literal: PreCheck 本应对旅客和运输安全管理局都是双赢。

chunks.english: a win-win for travelers and the TSA
chunks.chinese: 对旅客和运输安全管理局的双赢

original: Passengers who pass a background check are eligible to use expedited screening lanes.
translation_literal: 通过背景审查的乘客有资格使用快速安检通道。

chunks.english: Passengers who pass a background check

chunks.relation: who 定语从句内部主语
who 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: eligible to use expedited screening lanes
chunks.chinese: 有资格使用快速安检通道

original: This allows the TSA to focus on travelers who are higher risk, saving time for everyone involved.
translation_literal: 这使运输安全管理局能够专注于风险更高的旅客，从而为所有相关人员节省时间。

chunks.english: to focus on travelers who are higher risk
chunks.chinese: 专注于风险更高的旅客
chunks.relation: 补充说明允许 TSA 做什么
who 定语从句内部主语
who 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.chinese: 为所有相关人员节省时间
chunks.relation: 说明 This allows... 的结果

original: The TSA wants to enroll 25 million people in PreCheck.
translation_literal: 运输安全管理局想让 2500 万人加入 PreCheck。

original: It has not gotten anywhere close to that, and one big reason is sticker shock: Passengers must pay $85 every five years to process their background checks.
translation_literal: 它还远没有接近那个目标，而一个重要原因是标价冲击：乘客必须每五年支付 85 美元来处理他们的背景审查。

chunks.english: It has not gotten anywhere close to that
chunks.chinese: 它还远没有接近那个目标

chunks.english: one big reason is sticker shock
chunks.chinese: 一个重要原因是标价冲击

chunks.english: Passengers must pay $85 every five years to process their background checks
chunks.chinese: 乘客必须每五年支付 85 美元来处理他们的背景审查
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释 sticker shock 的具体内容

chunks.chinese: 为了处理他们的背景审查

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 抽象名词 + 冒号解释
sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后说明 sticker shock 的具体价格内容。
句子先并列说明现状和原因，再用冒号解释原因。

key_phrases.meaning: 标价冲击，价格太高带来的震惊

original: Since the beginning, this price tag has been PreCheck’s fatal flaw.
translation_literal: 从一开始，这个价格标签就是 PreCheck 的致命缺陷。

chunks.relation: 作 has been 的表语

original: Upcoming reforms might bring the price to a more reasonable level.
translation_literal: 即将到来的改革可能会把价格降到一个更合理的水平。

chunks.relation: 说明 bring the price 的结果

original: But Congress should look into doing so directly, by helping to finance PreCheck enrollment or to cut costs in other ways.
translation_literal: 但是国会应该直接研究这样做，通过帮助资助 PreCheck 注册或以其他方式削减成本。

chunks.relation: 作 look into 的宾语

chunks.english: by helping to finance PreCheck enrollment or to cut costs in other ways
chunks.chinese: 通过帮助资助 PreCheck 注册或以其他方式削减成本
chunks.relation: 说明 doing so 的方式

chunks.chinese: 帮助资助 PreCheck 注册

chunks.english: to cut costs in other ways

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: by doing A or to do B
sentence_patterns.explanation: by 后两个方式并列，说明国会可以怎样降低价格。

original: The TSA cannot continue diverting resources into underused PreCheck lanes while most of the traveling public suffers in unnecessary lines.
translation_literal: 当大多数旅行公众在不必要的队伍中受苦时，运输安全管理局不能继续把资源转移到利用不足的 PreCheck 通道中。

chunks.chinese: 到利用不足的 PreCheck 通道中

chunks.english: while most of the traveling public suffers in unnecessary lines
chunks.chinese: 当大多数旅行公众在不必要的队伍中受苦时
chunks.relation: 说明 continue diverting 的同时背景
说明 suffers 的地点/状态

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.explanation: while 从句不是转折，而是说明 TSA 分配资源时公众仍在排队的背景。

original: It is long past time to make the program work.
translation_literal: 早就该让这个项目发挥作用了。

chunks.chinese: 早就过了该做某事的时候

chunks.relation: 真正主语，对应形式主语 It
补充说明 program 的状态

sentence_patterns.explanation: It 是形式主语，真正主语是不定式 to make...。
